channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: High amount of rubbish dumped, 22nd March

item.title: Fly tipping - mattress and more, 22nd March
item.description:
Mattress and general rubbish fly tipped on the corner of cazenove road again - very common here

item.title: There is a dead fox on the road, 22nd March
item.description:
It's been there for two days now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke, Greater London

item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Every week there is fly tipping here. We need enforcement. A sign and cctv.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags on pavement, 22nd March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Dunstan's Grove, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Unauthorized Car, 22nd March
item.description:
Owner of this car is not resident of Goodrich House, gate are broken and people keeps leaving cars on our car parking. We have no space for ours car. Can you fix the problem and the gate?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vartry Road, Tottenham, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 22nd March
item.description:
Someone left the car with lots of rubbish and staff around the car. The car dosnt belong to anyone who live in Goodrich house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The double bollards in bull alley have been removed they have been missing for some months now and it has become a rat run for traffic wishing to avoid the high street I was almost hit by vehicles on several occasions who race through here it is a public FOOTPATH not meant to be used for traffic or parking children frequently use the alleyway to get to the high street, schools and Danson park as well as other vulnerable pedestrians or this in wheelchairs I reported this last year I was again actually hit be a vehicle this weekend please fix asap, 22nd March
item.description:
Bollards in Bull Alley welling were illegally removed leaving an extremely dangerous situation now alley is being used as a rat run to avoid high street and access Woolwich i have been hit by a car again this weekend I’m disabled this is a public footpath used by many children as well as elderly and vulnerable adults including wheelchairs it is only pedestrian route to Danson park, several schools shops and buses more and more drivers have realised they can cut through now including delivery drivers this is intolerable I’ve reported previous and no action are you waiting for serious injury
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working - Buckingham road junction with culford, 22nd March
item.description:
Multiple lights are out on Buckingham road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Free freezer and other rubbish dumped, 22nd March

item.title: Fly tipping and rats, 22nd March
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped here at least six monhths ago. There are now rats living amongst it, and more dumping hsa happened recently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several Large Potholes, 22nd March
item.description:
There are several large/deep potholes in close proximity to each other thus making it difficult to avoid when driving. They are on the side of the dual carriageway heading towards the Audi Whitehouse Garage. Potential to cause damage to a car and possible cause of a road traffic accident as drivers swerve in to the other lane to avoid them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Underpass, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal by the side of pedestrian path, 22nd March
item.description:
Foul air around the dead animal Needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking for permit holders only, 22nd March
item.description:
Someone keep leaving the cars on car park. he dosnt live in Goodrich house. The gates to car park has been broken.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vartry Road, Tottenham, London
Report on FixMyStreet
